{{Quote|Without order, we'll have chaos.|Governor Tchai|<ref name="The Weapons Master!">{{StoryCite|story=The Weapons Master!|book=Star Wars Weekly 104}}</ref>}}
'''Tchai''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] governor, presumably of [[Challon]]. While he disagreed with some of the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor's]] increasing restrictions, he saw no alternative. He expressed these views to [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] after she gave a speech while on visit to Challon.
